Section Block 3 — Genre Spotlight
Booky Press

The Glass Meridian

N. Adisa

Spotlight Science Fiction

The Glass Meridian

N. Adisa

4.9 (1,428)

A visionary debut about a cartographer tasked with mapping a world that refuses to stay still — part thriller, part meditation on identity and belonging.

Get this book — $13.99 Preview
Genre

Science Fiction

Explore futures imagined with rigour and wonder. From hard SF epics to intimate social speculation — over 3,200 titles on Booky.

Choose an amount

  • Delivered instantly to any email address

Section Block 7 — How It Works
Simple as that

Get your next book in minutes

From discovery to download — four easy steps.

  1. 1

    Discover your next read

    Browse 50,000+ titles by genre, mood, or recommendation. Our curated lists and smart search make finding the perfect book effortless.

  2. 2

    Add to your basket

    Choose digital, print, or audio. Mix and match formats — your order is saved securely while you keep browsing.

  3. 3

    Check out securely

    Pay by card, PayPal, or gift card. Your payment details are always encrypted and never stored without your consent.

  4. 4

    Start reading instantly

    eBooks are available immediately in your Booky account. Read on any device — app, browser, or e-reader. Your library, everywhere.

Browse 50,000+ books

No subscription required · Free returns on print

Meet the authors

All events
Jun 21
Book signing

The Strand, New York

6:00 PM – 8:00 PM EDT

Eleanor Finch signs The Lantern of Aldridge Bay

Join us for a special evening with debut author Eleanor Finch. Reading, Q&A, and book signing. Limited spaces — register early.

48 going

Register
Jul 4
Online

Virtual — Zoom Webinar

5:00 PM – 6:30 PM BST

Sci-Fi Book Club: The Glass Meridian live discussion

N. Adisa joins our monthly virtual book club to discuss themes of identity, technology, and cartography in his debut novel.

132 registered

Join free
Jul 12
Workshop

Waterstones Piccadilly, London

2:00 PM – 5:00 PM BST

Creative Writing Workshop: Finding Your Voice

A hands-on afternoon workshop led by Marenne Vale, exploring how to develop a distinctive authorial voice. Limited to 20 participants.

Section Block 10 — FAQ Teaser
Got questions?

Frequently asked

Everything you need to know about ordering, delivery, memberships, and returns.

See all FAQs

eBooks are available immediately after your payment is confirmed — usually within seconds. You'll find your purchase in your Booky account under "My Library" and can start reading in your browser or download to the Booky app on any device.

All eBooks on Booky are DRM-free and available in EPUB and PDF formats. EPUB is compatible with most e-readers including Kindle (via email), Kobo, and Apple Books. PDF is ideal for formatted texts like graphic novels or academic titles.

Print books can be returned within 30 days in original condition for a full refund. For eBooks, we offer a 7-day satisfaction guarantee — if you've read less than 10% of the book, you can request a refund from your account dashboard.

Booky offers three tiers: Basic (free), Plus ($6/month), and Premium ($14/month). All paid plans include a 30-day free trial and can be cancelled at any time — no lock-in. Members save an average of 40% on every purchase compared to cover price.

Section Block 11 — About Intro
Booky Press

Our Story

2012

Founded

Our story

Born from a love of reading

Booky started in a tiny Edinburgh flat in 2012, when three friends who couldn't stop talking about books decided to build the bookstore they always wished existed — one that combined the charm of an independent shop with the convenience of the digital age.

Today, we're a team of 48 passionate readers, editors, and engineers helping over a million book lovers discover their next favourite read. We still hand-pick every title in our featured collections, just as we did on day one.

Books available
50,000+
Happy readers
1.2M+
Countries served
98
Trustpilot Excellent · 4.8/5
B Corp Certified 2024
Read our story Meet the team
